overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a long coat walking along a forest trail. The character passes a wooden signpost and encounters another pedestrian before veering off the path toward a rocky cliff face. The environment features lush greenery, fallen logs, and a mix of dirt paths and grassy areas under a partly cloudy sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through the forest, approaching a distant figure ahead

entered.detail: weathered wooden signpost with multiple directional signs and moss
tall stone cliff face with patches of moss and vegetation
decaying logs lining the left side of the trail
dense deciduous trees with full green foliage forming a canopy

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a forest trail with a wooden signpost visible on the right and a rocky cliff face in the distance on the left. Fallen logs line the path as the character approaches a distant pedestrian walking in the opposite direction.

events.description: passes a man in a suit and bowler hat walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continues walking forward and passes the oncoming pedestrian on the narrow trail

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera character wearing a dark suit and bowler hat

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes a well-dressed pedestrian walking in the opposite direction. The wooden signpost falls behind as the rocky cliff face on the left draws closer and the trail continues through the dense forest.

events.description: character leaves the dirt path and walks into tall grass toward the rock face

agents.ego_description: veers left off the main trail and walks through tall grass toward the rocky cliff face

entered.detail: lush green grass reaching knee height covering the forest floor

segments.scene_description: After passing the pedestrian, the character leaves the dirt trail and moves into tall grass approaching the rocky cliff face. The ground transitions from packed dirt to lush vegetation as the character explores the area at the base of the stone wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a forest trail that gradually shifts from a structured path into the wild vegetation at the base of a cliff. It begins with the character walking past a wooden signpost and fallen logs, moving toward a distant pedestrian while a rocky cliff face looms in the distance. As the character approaches and passes the well-dressed pedestrian, the signpost recedes and the stone wall on the left draws closer through the dense forest. The scene then shifts as the character leaves the packed dirt trail behind, moving into tall grass and lush vegetation. Finally, the camera follows the character as they explore the rugged terrain directly at the base of the rocky cliff.
